steps.title: Use vertex form
steps.content:
The maximum occurs $4$ seconds after launch at height $324$, so the vertex is $(4{,}324)$. The model has the form
$$
f(t)=a(t-4)^2+324
$$

steps.title: Write the model
steps.content: Substitute $a=-16$ into vertex form: $$ f(t)=-16(t-4)^2+324 $$ The answer is D.
